matchers.value: ^ ?(?:([^ ]{1,512}))? {0,8}ESMTP Service \(IBM Domino Release (\d+\.[\w.]+(?: HF\d+)?)\) ready at (.+) *$
matchers.version_extract: ^ ?(?:([^ ]{1,512}))? {0,8}ESMTP Service \(IBM Domino Release (\d+\.[\w.]+(?: HF\d+)?)\) ready at (.+) *$

examples: foo.bar ESMTP Service (IBM Domino Release 9.0.1FP8 HF475) ready at Thu, 30 Nov 2017 17:55:48 +0900
foo.bar ESMTP Service (IBM Domino Release 9.0.1) ready at Thu, 30 Nov 2017 10:12:26 +0100
ESMTP Service (IBM Domino Release 9.0.1FP8) ready at Thu, 30 Nov 2017 13:51:59 -0800
